posts.author: NLtTreeService652 (Taylor Boria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I would like to request the ability to add updates via iOS mobile app in offline mode. this would be immensely helpful and would allow important notes of communication to those that are assigned to the job and access the job at a later date, ensures they have all the information necessary and as fresh from memory as possible. Please consider this, this would really enhance many user experiences.
